# Agent Card File Reference Fixtures

These fixtures document the v0.4.4 Agent Card truthfulness pass.

- Defaults remain quiet and do not advertise file support.
- Half-open gates remain quiet and do not advertise file-reference support.
- Open gates advertise only Hermes-specific pre-staged local stored ID references.
- The open-gate card does not advertise uploads, inline bytes, URI references, remote fetch, arbitrary local paths, or broad file-part conformance.
- Fixtures contain no auth credentials, local absolute paths, storage paths, raw bytes, credential URLs, or concrete stored IDs.
